sections.paragraph:
ζ´ numerical sign = 7 (ἑπτά) Ac 12:10 D; GJs 10:1 (SyrBar 12:5); or 7th (ἑβδόμη) Hm 7; [s 7] in the superscriptions (Apollon. Paradox. 33: Θεόφραστος ἐν τῷ ζ´ περὶ φυτῶν).

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

SyrBar SyrBar = Apocalypsis Syriaca Baruch—List 2

Hm Hm = Mandates

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 424
